PreToolUse.command: cmd /d /s /c "where context-mode >nul 2>nul && context-mode hook vscode-copilot pretooluse || exit /b 0"

PostToolUse.command: cmd /d /s /c "where context-mode >nul 2>nul && context-mode hook vscode-copilot posttooluse || exit /b 0"

PreCompact.command: cmd /d /s /c "where context-mode >nul 2>nul && context-mode hook vscode-copilot precompact || exit /b 0"

SessionStart.command: cmd /d /s /c "where context-mode >nul 2>nul && context-mode hook vscode-copilot sessionstart || exit /b 0"
